understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to progress through all levels by placing every selectable piece onto a distinct goal tile (+) simultaneously in the grid, achieving a WIN condition for each level within the finite step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) by 3 pixels per cell in the chosen direction, succeeding unless blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; pushable blocks (B) can be displaced if adjacent in the movement direction. CLICK with target_position switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates without moving it, enabling control of multiple pieces to position all on goals at once. Heuristic hints like movement.{direction}_blocked provide guidance but require testing due to nuanced wall/object interactions.
